title: Post-16 education and skills white paper
body: "This document outlines reforms to the post-16 education and skills system in England to:   meet the needs of the economy close skills gaps support growth   It is aimed at partners involved in delivering the skills system, including:   post-16 education and training providers local and strategic authorities employers individual learners   It also sets out reforms to higher education teaching and research. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
